title: Blockfront - spawn vehicles in dedicated server
description:
SERVER SIDE ONLY!!!!

Tired of not being able to spawn vehicles in dedicated server out of blockfront matches? 

You're welcome.
body:
We are a lot to love Blockfront mod, one of the most impressive mod I ever saw since me first day on Minecraft in 2013. However... dedicated users know we can't spawn any vehicles when we are not in a match. I tried everything: datapack, tricky commands using mounted entity, manually edition of entity nbt file. Nothing. Nothing worked. There was one left solution: learn how to make a mods to patch it: and here we are. Please, have fun with vehicles in dedicated server.

You're welcome.

Don't forget to check the official mod page: [modrinth-blockfront](https://modrinth.com/mod/blockfront)


**IMPORTANT**
I will most likely have to update this after each bf update, so be patient. You can request me to update it on Discord: "Unrectified2"
